records.question: Which user profiles have the name Tyler Swift, at most 99999998 followers, and a partitionid of at least 10?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
WHERE user_profiles.followers <= 99999998 AND user_profiles.name = 'Tyler Swift' AND user_profiles.partitionid >= 10
records.pred_sql:
SELECT uid
FROM user_profiles
WHERE name = 'Tyler Swift' AND followers <= 99999998 AND partitionid >= 10

records.question: What user profiles have at least 6662425 followers, where the name is Iron Man and the email is ts@richest.com, with a tweet saying Hello I'm Tony Stark. created on or before 2018-03-09 20:00:14, and whose partition ID is at most 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.followers >= 6662425 AND user_profiles.email = 'ts@richest.com' AND user_profiles.name = 'Iron Man' AND tweets.text = 'Hello I''m Tony Stark.' AND tweets.createdate <= '2018-03-09 20:00:14' AND user_profiles.partitionid <= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT user_profiles.uid
FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.followers >= 6662425
  AND user_profiles.name = 'Iron Man'
  AND user_profiles.email = 'ts@richest.com'
  AND tweets.text = 'Hello I''m Tony Stark.'
  AND tweets.createdate <= '2018-03-09 20:00:14'
  AND user_profiles.partitionid <= 1
